# Pkce.CreateChallenge method

Creates a complete PKCE pair (verifier + `S256` challenge + method) (R-23.5-a, R-23.5-b). Randomness is injectable for deterministic tests.

```csharp
public static PkceChallenge CreateChallenge(Func<int, byte[]>? randomSource = null)
```

| parameter | description |
| --- | --- |
| randomSource | OPTIONAL byte source; defaults to the CSPRNG. |

## Return Value

The PKCE pair.
